memory_candidates.content: Extension dependencies in this system are declared in manifest.json via a dependencies array. The loader auto-loads dependencies recursively with circular detection (loading stack) and a depth limit of 5. The extensions.json state file does NOT track per-extension dependencies -- those live only in source manifests. Resource-only extensions omit task_type and EXTENSION.md entirely.

Implementation summary for /distill command with scoring engine, four distillation operations, tombstone pattern, /todo integration, and documentation updates

memory_candidates.content: The /distill command extends skill-memory with mode=distill rather than creating a separate skill/agent. This follows the direct execution pattern where the command file handles argument parsing and the SKILL.md contains the full operation logic. Composite scoring uses weighted components (staleness 0.30, zero-retrieval 0.25, size 0.20, duplicate 0.25) with FSRS-inspired adjustments.

Tombstone pattern for safe memory deletion: add status:tombstoned and tombstoned_at to frontmatter, exclude from retrieval via status field in memory-index.json, hard-delete only via --gc after 7-day grace period. This preserves data safety while enabling cleanup.
